INSERT INTO sizes VALUES ('1 B'), ('2 KiB'), ('1 MB'), ('2 GiB'), ('2.5 MB'), ('3.14159 KB');
SELECT size_description, parseReadableSize(size_description) AS size_in_bytes FROM sizes;
SELECT arrayJoin(['0 B', '0.5 KiB', '3.999999 MiB', '4 MB']) AS readable_sizes, parseReadableSize(readable_sizes) AS sizes;
SELECT size_description, parseReadableSize(size_description) AS bytes FROM sizes WHERE bytes > 1024;
WITH (SELECT arrayJoin(['1 B', '100 KB', '1 GB']) AS sizes) AS temp_table SELECT sizes, parseReadableSize(sizes) AS bytes FROM temp_table;
CREATE TABLE sizes2 AS sizes ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY size_description;
INSERT INTO sizes2 SELECT * FROM sizes;
SELECT size_description, parseReadableSize(size_description) AS bytes FROM sizes2 WHERE bytes BETWEEN 1000 AND 2000000;
SELECT A.size_description, parseReadableSize(A.size_description) AS bytes_A, B.size_description, parseReadableSize(B.size_description) AS bytes_B FROM sizes A JOIN sizes B ON bytes_A < bytes_B;
SELECT parseReadableSize(size) FROM (SELECT arrayJoin(['10 KB', '1.5 MB', '100 MiB']) AS size) AS subquery;
